arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss defends Alex Milosevic absence - and explains why Marlon Pack was preferred at Millwall
arts.sum: John Mousinho defended his decision not to hand Alexander Milosevic a Pompey debut and insisted: He’s really close.

arts.ttl: Former Portsmouth and Bournemouth man completes long-awaited injury return in historic Crystal Palace triumph
arts.sum: A popular ex-Pompey player has a smile back on his face after a difficult campaign for Crystal Palace.

arts.ttl: Big Coventry City goalkeeper debate comes to the fore as Frank Lampard ponders Pompey selection
arts.sum: Predicted City team: Ben Wilson; Milan van Ewijk, Bobby Thomas, Liam Kitching, Jake Bidwell; Victor Torp, Matt Grimes, Jack Rudoni; Tatsuhiro Sakamoto, Haji Wright, Ephron Mason-Clark. However, who completes the midfield three is open to debate, with Victor Torp, Jamie Allen and Ben Sheaf competing to start against Pompey, while Josh Eccles continues to be sidelined with a slight calf injury.

arts.ttl: Preview: Coventry City vs. Portsmouth - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Championship clash between Coventry City and Portsmouth, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
